things.name: Ribeira District
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage colourful riverside neighbourhood along the Douro

things.name: Port Wine Cellars
things.description: Guided tastings at historic Port wine cellars in Vila Nova de Gaia across the river

things.name: Dom Luis I Bridge
things.description: Iconic double-deck iron bridge spanning the Douro with walkway and panoramic views

things.name: Livraria Lello
things.description: Magnificent Neo-Gothic bookshop often called one of the world's most beautiful

things.name: Sao Bento Railway Station
things.description: Stunning 20th-century station with 20,000 azulejo tiles depicting Portuguese history

things.name: Igreja dos Clerigos
things.description: Baroque church with Portugal's tallest bell tower, a Porto skyline landmark

things.name: Porto Cathedral (Se)
things.description: Romanesque and Gothic cathedral dating to the 12th century at the city's highest point

things.name: Palacio da Bolsa
things.description: Stunning 19th-century stock exchange with the extraordinary Arab Room

things.name: Serralves Museum
things.description: Contemporary art museum in a magnificent Art Deco villa with a 44-acre park

things.name: Foz do Douro
things.description: Elegant coastal neighbourhood at the river mouth with ocean promenade and seafood
